title: Affiliate Site Config
description: Schema for site-config.json used by the affiliate-site-template build system. Validates the Phase 0 variables for a single affiliate site.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file. Optional but recommended for IDE validation.

version.description: Schema version this config conforms to. Currently 1.0.0.

domain.description: Bare domain without protocol or trailing slash. Example: brewverdict.com

brandName.description: Display name of the site brand. Example: BrewVerdict

tagline.description: Short brand tagline shown in headers, footer, and schema description.

editorialTeamName.description: Name of the editorial team for author attribution. Example: BrewVerdict Editorial Team

namedAuthor.description: Optional named individual author for EEAT byline. When set, appears near the H1 in addition to the editorial team. Example: Robin Lilly

contactEmail.description: Public contact email for the site. Typically contact@[domain].

niche.description: The niche or topic of the site. Used to drive content sanitization. Example: specialty coffee brewing equipment

year.description: Current year for content freshness. Example: 2026

primaryKeyword.description: Exact primary keyword the site targets. Used verbatim in title, meta, H1. Example: best pour over coffee makers

authorityStatistic.description: Optional authority statistic with inline citation. Leave empty string to skip; build will not invent. Example: According to FEMA, only 39% of Americans have a household emergency plan.

quickAnswer.description: Direct answer to the primary keyword question. Must be 40 to 50 words. Appears above the hero image, marked with .quick-answer-box class for speakable schema.

indexNowKey.description: 32-character lowercase hex IndexNow API key. Unique per site. Used for fast Bing/Yandex indexing.

ga4MeasurementId.description: Optional GA4 Measurement ID. Format: G-XXXXXXXXXX. When provided, GA4 tracking is baked into the HTML head.

type.description: Which template type to build. Determines build type and product count.

buildType.description: Auto-determined from template type. Listicle and tool default to react; review, headtohead, amazon, leadgen default to html. Override-able only with documented reason.

handsOnReview.description: Whether this site claims first-hand product testing. When true, EEAT rule pack (99-custom/google-eeat-essentials.md) permits first-person experience language. When false, content is research-based only.

launchJackMode.description: For review template only. When true, enables launch-jacking layout: countdown timer, two-state CTA, bonus stack, email capture. Requires launch and cart-close timestamps in the launchJack object.

launchJack.description: Launch-jacking fields. Required when template.launchJackMode is true.

colorScheme.description: Human-readable color scheme description. Example: deep coffee brown and warm cream

primaryColor.description: Primary brand color in hex. Used for backgrounds, dividers, non-CTA accents.

accentColor.description: Accent color in hex. Reserved EXCLUSIVELY for CTA buttons and hover states per rules/02-design-mandatory.md.

darkestBrandColor.description: Darkest color in the brand palette. Used for body text, headings, and in-content links per rules/02-design-mandatory.md.

amazonTag.description: Amazon Associates tag if Amazon is in networks. Example: brewverdict-20

networks.description: Affiliate networks used on this site. Drives disclosure requirements and which custom rules to enable.

shortForms.description: Optional shorter forms of the product name for auto-linking. Example for Orange Whip Trainer: ["Orange Whip"]

affiliateLink.description: The actual affiliate destination URL with all tracking parameters. Treated as opaque; build does not modify.

shortDescription.description: 1-2 sentence product description for cards and comparison table.

bestFor.description: Who or what use case this product is best for. Appears as 'Best For:' line in product card.

pros.description: 3 to 5 bullet points highlighting product strengths.

considerations.description: Optional 1 to 3 considerations or drawbacks. If provided, ALL products in the grid must have considerations (per 05-affiliate-mandatory.md card consistency rule).

verdict.description: Optional 1-2 sentence summary verdict. If provided, ALL products in the grid must have a verdict.

specificDetail.description: One concrete, specific detail that distinguishes this product from generic prose. Required per 04-content-mandatory.md rule 7.5.

researchScope.description: What the editorial team researches in this niche. Example: pour over drippers, kettles, grinders, scales

comparisonAxes.description: How readers compare options. Example: budget, brew style, learning curve, ease of cleaning

pickedItemNoun.description: Plural noun for what was picked. Used in 'How We Picked These X' heading. Example: pour over setups

selectionCriteria.description: How selections were made. Example: real-world usability, price range, availability

nicheReviewItems.description: What gets reviewed each update cycle. Example: filtration, pour control, temperature stability

riskTier.description: Niche risk tier. 1 = health/medical/safety (auto-injects safety disclaimers). 2 = financial (auto-injects financial disclaimers). 3 = general consumer (affiliate disclosure only).

activityNoun.description: Singular capitalized activity name. Example: Cold Plunge

activityVerb.description: Verb phrase for the activity. Example: using cold exposure

riskConditions.description: Medical conditions or circumstances to flag. Example: heart conditions, blood pressure concerns, circulation issues, pregnancy

riskyLanguageToAvoid.description: Comma-separated phrases to avoid. Example: cold therapy, recovery, healing, treatment

cautiousLanguageToUseInstead.description: Comma-separated cautious alternatives. Example: cold water immersion, cold plunge routine, post-workout cold exposure

tier1Fields.description: Required when riskTier === 1. Must be null otherwise.

enabled.description: Filenames in rules/99-custom/ to load (without .md extension). Example: ["google-eeat-essentials", "ftc-affiliate-disclosure"]

disabled.description: Filenames in rules/99-custom/ to explicitly skip. Takes precedence over enabled.
